creator: croyle@gelemna.ft-wayne.in.us
text:
Tim Vanderhoek <vanderh@ecf.utoronto.ca> writes:

> On Sun, Jul 18, 1999 at 07:40:35PM -0500, Don Croyle wrote:
> > 
> > I'm also changing the primary MASTER_SITE to the site that the old one
> > has been being redirected to all along.
> 
> Why?  Isn't bigfoot.com one of those sites people sometimes use
> specifically for the purpose of redirection (similar to pobox.com) so
> that if they switch webspace providers all the links continue to work.

Because somebody decided to define FETCH as /usr/bin/fetch -A, so it
doesn't follow the redirection.
-- 
I've always wanted to be a dilettante, but I've never quite been ready
to make the commitment.
